# Maine Dispensary Guide
https://mainedispensaryguide.com

Comprehensive resource for Maine cannabis licensing, dispensary operations, and market intelligence.

## Getting Started
- [Start Here](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/start-here/) - Your first steps to opening a Maine dispensary
- [2026 Launch Checklist](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/launch-checklist/) - Step-by-step checklist for OCP and municipal filings
- [How to Open a Dispensary in Maine](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/blog/maine-dispensary-how-to-open/) - Complete walkthrough with timelines

## Licensing & Compliance
- [Maine Dispensary License Requirements](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-dispensary-license/) - OCP requirements, license types, fees, and application process
- [Licensing Costs & Total Investment](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-dispensary-costs/) - Complete cost breakdown ($300K-$1M)
- [Maine Cannabis Regulations 2026](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-regulations/) - State laws, local ordinances, and compliance requirements
- [OCP License Map](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-ocp-license-map/) - Visual map of all licensed operators by region
- [Metrc Compliance Guide](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-metrc-compliance-guide/) - Seed-to-sale tracking and inventory requirements
- [Marketing Compliance](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-marketing-compliance/) - Advertising restrictions, age-gating, signage rules
- [280E Tax Guide](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-taxation-280e/) - Federal tax burden and state-level workarounds
- [2026 Cannabis Taxes](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-taxes-2026/) - Current excise rates, sales tax, and compliance calendar
- [Municipal Opt-In Guide](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-municipal-opt-in-guide/) - How towns decide to authorize cannabis businesses
- [Municipal Opt-In Tracker](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-opt-in-tracker/) - Current opt-in status by municipality

## City Guides
- [Portland](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/portland-dispensary-guide/) - Maine's largest cannabis market
- [Lewiston](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/lewiston-dispensary-guide/) - Second-largest metro
- [Bangor](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/bangor-dispensary-guide/) - Eastern Maine hub
- [Augusta](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/augusta-dispensary-guide/) - State capital market
- [Auburn](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/auburn-dispensary-guide/) - L-A metro
- [Biddeford](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/biddeford-dispensary-guide/) - Young, growing market
- [South Portland](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/south-portland-dispensary-guide/)
- [Brunswick](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/brunswick-dispensary-guide/)
- [Scarborough](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/scarborough-dispensary-guide/)
- [Old Orchard Beach](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/old-orchard-beach-dispensary-guide/)
- [Waterville](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/waterville-dispensary-guide/)
- [Saco](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/saco-dispensary-guide/) - Not yet opted in
- [Sanford](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/sanford-dispensary-guide/)
- [Kittery](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/kittery-dispensary-guide/)
- [Westbrook](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/westbrook-dispensary-guide/)

## Market Intelligence
- [Maine Cannabis Market Overview](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-market/) - Industry size, trends, and pricing data
- [Market Stats](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/market-stats/) - Real-time metrics
- [Banking Solutions](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-banking-solutions/) - Cannabis-friendly financial institutions
- [Real Estate & Zoning](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-real-estate/) - Location selection, commercial leasing
- [School Buffer Requirements](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/maine-cannabis-school-buffer/) - Property line distance rules by municipality

## FAQ
- [Complete FAQ](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/guides/faq/) - 80+ questions across licensing, zoning, tax, operations, and cities
- [ROI Calculator](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/roi-calculator/) - Estimate profitability for your market
- [Contact](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/contact/) - Submit questions or partnership inquiries

## About
- [Our Team](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/about/our-team/) - Editorial staff and contributors
- [Founders Stories](https://mainedispensaryguide.com/founders/) - Maine cannabis entrepreneur profiles
